codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex returned 13 PROPOSED_FIX findings. Key corrections: NESTED-REPO.md is a root sentinel (false positive for move); docs/dev/*.md 'JSON only' rule is overbroad and breaks /dev /close /commit contracts; docs/incidents-*.md should move to docs/reference/ not docs/archive/; docs/server-infra.md contains credentials and needs security escalation; playwright-storage-state.json contains auth tokens and must be flagged as sensitive; all scripts/todo/*.py are dynamically referenced by command name via hook-todo-injection and are false positives for orphan; agents/product-owner.md is dynamically orchestrated and is a false positive for orphan.

findings.issue: NESTED-REPO.md flagged as misplaced_doc — it is a root sentinel warning about nested repo boundary
findings.proposed_fix: Remove from misplaced_docs, add to allowed root exceptions list
findings.rationale: NESTED-REPO.md serves as a boundary warning at project root. Moving it defeats its purpose.

findings.issue: docs/dev/*.md should be JSON only rule is overbroad — /dev, /close, /commit, BA/QA all expect ticket-*.md, ba-spec-*.md, close-report-*.md, completion-*.md in docs/dev/
findings.proposed_fix: Archive only old completed docs/dev/*.md; preserve active workflow artifacts
findings.rationale: The JSON-only interpretation of docs/dev/ conflicts with established command contracts. Active .md artifacts must stay.

findings.issue: docs/dev/close-report-*.md must not be blindly moved — /commit resolves close reports from docs/dev/close-report-*.md
findings.proposed_fix: Keep current close reports in docs/dev/; archive only after confirming no downstream dependency
findings.rationale: Recent close-report files are consumed by /commit and /close workflows.

findings.issue: docs/incidents-*.md are active safety references — CLAUDE.md:18 directly references the April incident
findings.proposed_fix: Move to docs/reference/ not docs/archive/, update CLAUDE.md references atomically
findings.rationale: These are actively referenced safety docs; archiving would break CLAUDE.md links.

findings.issue: Moving docs/checkpoint-mechanism.md and docs/server-infra.md without reference updates would break CLAUDE.md:35 and CLAUDE.md:94
findings.proposed_fix: Word findings as 'move AND update CLAUDE.md/README cross-references in the same cleanup action'
findings.rationale: Cross-reference updates must accompany any move of these files.

findings.issue: docs/server-infra.md underclassified — contains credentials/passwords at lines 17-22
findings.proposed_fix: Reclassify as sensitive_document: redact or externalize secrets, rotate if needed, then move
findings.rationale: Security escalation required before any file move action.

findings.issue: AUTOMATED_CLEANUP_SETUP.md listed both as move-to-guides/reference AND as archive candidate — conflicting classification
findings.proposed_fix: Single action: move to docs/archive/2026-03/ or docs/reports/; remove from misplaced_docs guide/reference destination
findings.rationale: Dual classification creates contradictory action items.

findings.issue: playwright-config.json is functional config, not a non-functional file
findings.rationale: playwright-config.json points at playwright-storage-state.json and is functionally referenced.

findings.issue: playwright-storage-state.json is under-severity — contains auth state/token material
findings.proposed_fix: Reclassify as critical sensitive runtime state: remove from git tracking, add ignore rule, rotate/revoke token
findings.rationale: Auth tokens should never be tracked in git.

findings.issue: Recent untracked workflow-*.json files are gitignored live workflow state — not non-functional files
findings.proposed_fix: Remove from non_functional_files findings; keep only git-tracked ones as cleanup targets
findings.rationale: Already gitignored files are expected runtime artifacts and should not be flagged.

findings.issue: For tracked runtime state files, action 'delete' is unsafe wording
findings.proposed_fix: Action should be 'untrack_from_git' and 'add_to_gitignore'; local file preserved unless user explicitly approves deletion
findings.rationale: Safety rules require user confirmation before deletion.

findings.issue: scripts/todo/*.py are dynamically loaded by command name via hook-todo-injection.py and prompt-workflow.py — static grep misses them
findings.proposed_fix: Remove all scripts/todo/<command>.py from orphan findings when matching commands/<command>.md exists
findings.rationale: Dynamic loading pattern means static reference scan produces false positives for this directory.

findings.issue: agents/product-owner.md is dynamically orchestrated by /dev, /dev-command, /dev-overnight, PM, spec workflows
findings.proposed_fix: Remove from orphaned_subagents; add to workflow-orchestrated exception list
findings.rationale: Dynamic dispatch is the expected pattern for this agent.

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: All 13 PROPOSED_FIX items applied: NESTED-REPO.md removed from misplaced_docs; docs/dev/*.md overbroad JSON-only rule corrected; close-report active files kept; incidents-*.md destination changed from archive to reference; server-infra.md escalated to sensitive_document with security flag; playwright-storage-state.json escalated to critical with git-untrack action; gitignored workflow-*.json removed from findings; scripts/todo/*.py false positives removed; product-owner.md false positive removed.

misplaced_docs.issue: Old setup doc in project root — completed 55+ days ago, 1 commit only
misplaced_docs.recommendation: Archive to docs/archive/2026-03/AUTOMATED_CLEANUP_SETUP.md; content is historical setup notes

misplaced_docs.issue: Reference doc in docs/ root, not in subdirectory. Should be in docs/reference/. NOTE: CLAUDE.md:35 links to this file — update link atomically with move.
misplaced_docs.recommendation: Move to docs/reference/checkpoint-mechanism.md AND update CLAUDE.md reference in same action

misplaced_docs.issue: Incident report in docs/ root, not in subdirectory. Should be in docs/reference/ (active safety reference).
Incident report in docs/ root, not in subdirectory. Should be in docs/reference/ (CLAUDE.md:18 directly references April incident).
misplaced_docs.recommendation: Move to docs/reference/incidents-2026-04-04.md AND update CLAUDE.md:18 reference atomically

misplaced_docs.issue: SENSITIVE DOCUMENT: server-infra.md in docs/ root contains credentials/passwords (lines 17-22). Also misplaced — should be in docs/reference/. Security review required before move.
misplaced_docs.recommendation: SECURITY ACTION FIRST: redact or externalize credentials at lines 17-22, rotate secrets if needed. Then move to docs/reference/server-infra.md AND update CLAUDE.md:94 reference.

misplaced_docs.issue: Orphaned commit-manifest JSON in docs/ root — should be in docs/dev/ where other cycle manifests live
Old completion doc in docs/dev/ — from 2026-01-07, >130 days old. Part of 7 completion-dev-* files from January 2026.
misplaced_docs.recommendation: Archive to docs/dev/archive/2026-01/ (7 completion-dev-* files from early January)

misplaced_docs.issue: Legacy BA spec in docs/dev/ — 31 days old. Note: docs/dev/ retains .md files by active command contract; this is flagged only for age-based archiving review.
misplaced_docs.recommendation: Archive to docs/dev/archive/2026-04/ if no active task references this task-id (20260416-063500)

misplaced_docs.issue: Legacy BA spec in docs/dev/ — 31 days old. Archive candidate if task is complete.
misplaced_docs.recommendation: Archive to docs/dev/archive/2026-04/ if no active task references this task-id (20260416-073000)

archive_candidates.issue: Overnight session state file at project root — tracked in git, session completed on 2026-05-03 (14 days ago)
archive_candidates.recommendation: Remove from git tracking (git rm --cached), add pattern overnight-state-*.json to .gitignore, keep local file

dev_context_files.issue: 7 completion-dev-* .md files from January 2026 in docs/dev/ — 130+ days old, no active task dependency

non_functional_files.issue: Workflow session artifact tracked in git — 53 days old (2026-03-25). Runtime state should not be version-controlled.
non_functional_files.recommendation: Remove from git tracking with git rm --cached; ensure workflow-*.json is in .gitignore (pattern already present in .gitignore)

non_functional_files.issue: Workflow session artifact tracked in git — 31 days old (2026-04-16).
non_functional_files.recommendation: Remove from git tracking with git rm --cached

non_functional_files.issue: Workflow session artifact tracked in git — 52 days old (2026-03-26).
non_functional_files.recommendation: Remove from git tracking with git rm --cached

non_functional_files.issue: Workflow session artifact tracked in git — 28 days old (2026-04-19).
non_functional_files.recommendation: Remove from git tracking with git rm --cached

non_functional_files.issue: Stats cache file tracked in git — 54 days old (2026-03-24). Runtime cache should not be version-controlled.
non_functional_files.recommendation: Remove from git tracking with git rm --cached; add stats-cache.json to .gitignore

non_functional_files.issue: Playwright config tracked in git — 53 days old (2026-03-25). Review whether this is intentional functional config or stale runtime artifact. If functional, keep tracked; if runtime-only, untrack.
non_functional_files.recommendation: Needs user confirmation: is playwright-config.json intentionally version-controlled? If yes, keep; if runtime-only, run git rm --cached and add to .gitignore.

non_functional_files.issue: CRITICAL SECURITY: Auth state/token material tracked in git — contains browser session/auth tokens (2026-03-29, 49 days ago). Tokens may be stale but pattern is unsafe.
non_functional_files.recommendation: IMMEDIATE ACTION: (1) Remove from git tracking with git rm --cached, (2) Add playwright-storage-state.json to .gitignore, (3) Review tokens for rotation/revocation. Do NOT archive — security artifact.

non_functional_files.issue: Overnight session state tracked in git — 14 days old (2026-05-03). Runtime state should not be version-controlled.
non_functional_files.recommendation: Remove from git tracking with git rm --cached; add overnight-state-*.json pattern to .gitignore

orphaned_subagents.note: agents/product-owner.md was flagged by detect-orphan-agents.sh but is a false positive — it is dynamically orchestrated by /dev, /dev-command, /dev-overnight, PM, and spec workflows. Per codex feedback, removed from findings.

orphan_agents.disposition: FALSE_POSITIVE — dynamically orchestrated agent, not static-reference detectable

unreferenced_scripts.note: scripts/todo/*.py files were flagged by detect-orphan-scripts.sh but are false positives — they are dynamically loaded by command name via hooks/hook-todo-injection.py, hooks/lib/todo_canonical.py, and hooks/prompt-workflow.py. Per codex feedback, all scripts/todo/*.py with matching commands/*.md are excluded from findings.

raw_script_output_summary.reason: Dynamic command-name loading via hook-todo-injection.py:61-99 and prompt-workflow.py:584-602 means static grep misses valid entrypoints for scripts/todo/<command>.py when commands/<command>.md exists

notes: 1 critical: playwright-storage-state.json contains auth tokens tracked in git — security action required
4 major: workflow-*.json session artifacts tracked in git (untrack action only, files stay local)
1 major: docs/server-infra.md contains credentials — security review before move
docs/dev/*.md files: active workflow .md files (ticket-*, close-report-*, completion-*) are retained per command contract; only age >30d with no active task are flagged for archive
scripts/todo/*.py and agents/product-owner.md: all confirmed false positives via codex review — dynamically orchestrated/loaded
